summary: The new list-config write path is last-writer-wins on `board.json`, so concurrent edits can silently drop each other even though the endpoint returns 200.

findings.title: `PATCH /lists/:listId` can silently lose concurrent config edits because `board.json` is rewritten without any CAS or lock
findings.recommendation: Add optimistic concurrency or an exclusive lock around the board-level read/modify/write, similar to `saveCardCAS`. At minimum, carry a board revision/etag through `GET /lists` and reject stale `PATCH`es with 409 instead of overwriting a fresher save.
